title: Portable Context Control Plane — Budget State Input
description: Schema for the --budget CLI input file. Supplies the MVP budget configuration. Class B input — if absent: treat budget as unconstrained; selectors remain budget-aware but not budget-enforcing; emit budget_config_missing warning. Selectors use budget state as informational context only — budget enforcement is exclusively the Budgeter's responsibility after selector fan-out. Non-MVP fields explicitly excluded: dynamic threshold config, provider pricing, model cost fields, cache pricing/TTL/cache key fields. budgetCritical is a pre-computed flag indicating whether protected components already exceed target — not a dynamic threshold. Canonical owners: docs/06 §2.7; docs/11 §4.1; docs/12 §3.8.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-2B — Batch B. No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. No docs edited. Non-MVP excluded: dynamic threshold config, provider/model cost fields, cache pricing fields. Canonical sources: docs/06 §2.7, docs/04 §7.5, docs/11 §4.1, docs/12 §3.8.

totalPromptTokenTarget.title: Total prompt token target
totalPromptTokenTarget.description: The overall token budget ceiling for the assembled prompt. Integer >= 0. If 0 or missing, the Budgeter treats budget as unconstrained and emits a budget_config_missing warning. The Budgeter enforces this limit after selector fan-out; selectors are budget-aware (use this as context) but must not use budget pressure as an omission justification.

maxScaffoldTokens.title: Max scaffold tokens
maxScaffoldTokens.description: Maximum token allocation for scaffold-type components. Integer >= 0. Operator-supplied per-type budget slice. Used by the Budgeter for per-category trim decisions.

maxSkillTokens.title: Max skill tokens
maxSkillTokens.description: Maximum token allocation for skill-type components. Integer >= 0. Operator-supplied per-type budget slice.

maxToolTokens.title: Max tool tokens
maxToolTokens.description: Maximum token allocation for tool-type components. Integer >= 0. Operator-supplied per-type budget slice.

maxHistoryTokens.title: Max history tokens
maxHistoryTokens.description: Maximum token allocation for history-type components and turns. Integer >= 0. Operator-supplied per-type budget slice.

reservedUserTokens.title: Reserved user tokens
reservedUserTokens.description: Number of tokens reserved for the user turn (current request and expected response). Integer >= 0. Subtracted from totalPromptTokenTarget to determine available context tokens before component selection.

budgetCritical.title: Budget critical flag
budgetCritical.description: Pre-computed flag: true if protected components (mandatory, safety_critical) already exceed totalPromptTokenTarget before any optional trimming. When true, selectors may use this as an informational budget-pressure signal to compute informational budgetHint annotations on SelectionDecision records. Budget pressure does NOT authorize omission — only the Budgeter may trim, and only trim-eligible components. Canonical: docs/06 §2.7; docs/04 §7.5 no-unsafe-omission invariant.
